text:
Market today: Cautious tone. Real driver is inflation anxiety - Apple hiking prices signals sticky inflation, Goolsbee echoing that rates stay higher longer. That's compression fuel for high-multiple tech and chip names, exactly your book.

Your holdings: PLTR is the loudest alarm - down 17.71% and on a SELL signal; on margin, that hole gets bigger fast. AVGO is your largest position, down 13.3% with a TRIM signal - size plus loss plus margin is a dangerous combo. SPAL is down 17% and it's a 2x leveraged ETF that decays daily - every sideways day costs you; it needs a decision, not patience. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with thin data - treat it like a lit fuse.

Watch: (1) Any Fed speaker comments after Goolsbee - if hawkish tone spreads, your whole tech book gets hit. (2) AVGO price action - as your largest position it moves your P&L the most.

Bottom line: On margin, your three red flags (PLTR, AVGO, SPAL) need action today, not tomorrow.
